li.label: Horny rush
li.description: I felt something incredible, as if the entire world had sex with me. Such bliss... But now I crave more...

li.label: Royal luxury
li.description: The goddess has chosen me as her canvas of desire. I feel fundamentally superior, beautifully elevated, and absolutely immaculate.

li.label: Royal depravity
li.description: My subjects are mocking my status! They will have to pay for this.

li.label: Blessed spiritual clarity
li.description: Luxandra's touch has opened my eyes. My sacred role feels empowered, and a wave of pure, absolute pleasure radiates through my thoughts whenever I guide our flock.

li.label: Corrupted spiritual focus
li.description: The quiet promptings in my mind are overwhelming. My sacred duties feel hollow compared to the grand, dark desires the goddess has laid out for me...

li.label: Luxandra's Favor
li.description: The goddess is pleased with our passion. I feel a lingering wave of vitality and confidence.

li.label: Luxandra's Spite
li.description: The goddess is mocking our stagnation. The atmospheric energy leaves me feeling deeply uneasy and irritable.

li.label: Masculine growth
li.description: I feel an incredible surge of presence and raw power down below. It's magnificent.

li.label: Feminine growth
li.description: My body feels much more voluptuous and heavy... I feel deeply desirable.

li.label: Masculine shrinkage
li.description: Where did it go?! I feel diminished... exposed... smaller.

li.label: Feminine shrinkage
li.description: I feel so flat and light... My natural curves have wasted away.
